get.description: Keep a browser client synchronized through replayable SSE state changes.
Return the sole first-phase profile without per-stage toggle decoration.
Read the current manual scheduling queue.

put.description: Replace the queued ordering if the supplied revision is still current.

patch.description: Pause or resume a waiting task.

post.description: Inspect one normalized Bilibili source without creating a task.

get.description: Browse only explicitly configured local-import roots and descendants.
Return the requested bounded library page.

post.description: Create all legacy and workstation task records in one database transaction.
Apply one lifecycle, tag, or requeue operation per requested task.

patch.description: Replace the requested editable task metadata fields.
